title: Add sandbox allow to a Phoenix channel join/3
prompt: The fixture at `test_fixtures/channel_no_allow.ex` is a Phoenix channel `MyAppWeb.RoomChannel` whose `join/3` queries `Rooms.get_room/1` without first calling `Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox.allow/2`. In tests, the channel process is a different pid than the test process and has no sandbox access. Rewrite to `lib/my_app_web/channels/room_channel.ex`: add `allow_ecto_sandbox(socket)` as the first call in `join/3`, and implement `allow_ecto_sandbox/1` as a private function that extracts `socket.assigns.phoenix_ecto_sandbox` metadata and calls `Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox.allow(metadata, Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox)`.
tier_rationale: Multi-step — fix join/3 AND extract the helper function.
research_citation: "`allow/2` needs to be manually called once for each channel, at best directly at the start of `c:Phoenix.Channel.join/3`" — Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox docs
